//: Copy this file to config.json (gitignored) and fill it in — or run the guided setup. Every field is optional; omitted fields use the defaults shown here.

notifications.//: ntfy.sh push. Topic is the ONLY secret — make it random. Empty disables pushes. ntfyDetail:true sends task text to the PUBLIC broker.

artifactGlobs.//: Optional — directories the artifact/file scanners skip. Omit to use the built-in defaults.

projects.//: Keys are permanent identifiers (tasks/ledger/etc. are stored under them) — pick a short slug. status: active (default, no tag) | trial (tag in nav) | inactive (hidden from nav & overview). Manage these in-app via the Manage Projects tab.
